moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins tomorrow at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, featuring the world's best golfers.

source.l: The Open Official Site / TNT Sports

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: The Claret Jug is up for grabs! The Open Championship kicks off tomorrow at Royal Birkdale. Who are you backing for glory?

angles.name: Local Connection
angles.copy: Golf's biggest major is back in the North West! Royal Birkdale hosts The Open from tomorrow. Expect huge crowds and incredible action.

moments.title: Tour de France Continues
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France is well underway, with riders currently tackling the mountainous Stage 11 today, heading towards the grand finale in Paris on July 26.

source.l: Cycling Weekly / Tour de France Official

angles.name: Race Update
angles.copy: The Peloton powers through Stage 11 today! Who's holding the yellow jersey as the Tour de France continues its epic journey?

angles.name: Mountain Stages
angles.copy: Alps calling! The Tour de France is hitting its most brutal mountain stages. Pure grit and breathtaking views, who's watching?

moments.title: Wimbledon Aftermath
moments.blurb: The 2026 Wimbledon Championships concluded on July 12, leaving tennis fans buzzing about the champions and memorable moments of the tournament.

angles.name: Post-Tournament Buzz
angles.copy: Still got that Centre Court feeling? Wimbledon 2026 wrapped up on Sunday – what was your highlight of the Championships?

angles.name: British Success
angles.copy: From wildcards to semi-finals, British tennis had some incredible moments at Wimbledon this year. Who impressed you most?

moments.title: Premier League Transfer Window Hotting Up
moments.blurb: The Premier League summer transfer window is wide open, with clubs making big moves and speculation rife ahead of the September 1 deadline.

angles.name: Transfer Talk
angles.copy: Who's in, who's out? The Premier League transfer window is buzzing! Which signing has excited you most so far?

angles.name: Club Specific
angles.copy: London clubs are splashing the cash (or not)! How are your team's transfers shaping up this summer?

moments.title: London Athletics Meet
moments.blurb: The London Athletics Meet, a highlight of the 2026 athletics season, takes place this Saturday, July 18, at the London Stadium.

angles.name: Event Preview
angles.copy: Get ready for track and field action! The London Athletics Meet brings world-class athletes to the London Stadium this Saturday.

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: Planning your weekend? The London Athletics Meet is on Saturday – who are you hoping to see set a new record?

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival begins today in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, bringing four days of music and culture to Scotland.

angles.name: Festival Start
angles.copy: The Hebridean Celtic Festival is officially underway! Four days of incredible music and island vibes. Who's heading to Stornoway?

angles.name: Music & Culture
angles.copy: Beyond the main stages, HebCelt is a celebration of culture. What's your favourite thing about a festival experience?

moments.title: Splendour Festival Approaches
moments.blurb: Nottingham's Splendour Festival, featuring five stages of music, is set to take place this weekend, July 18-19, at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park.

angles.name: Weekend Festival
angles.copy: Nottingham, are you ready? Splendour Festival hits Wollaton Hall this weekend! Who's excited for two days of music?

angles.name: Lineup Tease
angles.copy: From chart-toppers to indie gems, Splendour Festival has it all. What acts are you desperate to see this weekend?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Next Week
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, celebrating its 20th anniversary, will take place next week from July 23-26 at Henham Park in Suffolk, offering music, comedy, arts, and more.

angles.name: Countdown
angles.copy: Just one week until Latitude Festival! Henham Park is about to come alive with music, comedy, and pure festival magic. Who's packed?

angles.name: Beyond Music
angles.copy: Latitude isn't just about the bands! What's your must-see comedy act or theatre show at this year's festival?

moments.title: Truck Festival Returns
moments.blurb: Truck Festival, Oxfordshire's indie-focused event, is set to return from July 23-26 at Hill Farm, Steventon.

angles.name: Indie Festival
angles.copy: Truck Festival is back next week! Get ready for a weekend of indie anthems and new discoveries at Hill Farm. Who's joining the fun?

angles.name: Local Excitement
angles.copy: Oxfordshire's biggest indie party is almost here! Truck Festival kicks off next Thursday. What's on your must-see list?

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Break Chart Record
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's duet 'Rein Me In' has achieved its 16th week at No. 1 on the UK Singles Chart, breaking Wet Wet Wet's 32-year record for a British act.

angles.name: Chart History
angles.copy: History made! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is officially the longest-running No. 1 by a British act. Incredible!

angles.name: Artist Spotlight
angles.copy: 16 weeks at the top! Sam Fender and Olivia Dean are dominating the charts. What's your favourite track from either artist?

moments.title: My Chemical Romance Chart Resurgence
moments.blurb: Following recent UK shows, My Chemical Romance's hits like 'Welcome to the Black Parade' and 'Helena' have re-entered the Official Rock & Metal Singles Chart.

angles.name: Band Comeback
angles.copy: They're back in the charts! My Chemical Romance hits are surging again after their UK shows. Which MCR classic is your go-to?

angles.name: Nostalgia Factor
angles.copy: Feeling nostalgic? My Chemical Romance is back in the Rock & Metal charts! Time to crank up 'Welcome to the Black Parade'!

moments.title: 'Elle' (Legally Blonde Prequel) Streaming Now
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated 'Legally Blonde' prequel series, 'Elle', premiered on Prime Video on July 1, following a teenage Elle Woods.

angles.name: New Series
angles.copy: What, like it's hard? The 'Legally Blonde' prequel 'Elle' is streaming on Prime Video! Have you binged it yet?

angles.name: Teenage Elle
angles.copy: Before Harvard, there was teenage Elle Woods. Dive into the 'Legally Blonde' prequel on Prime Video. What's your verdict?

moments.title: 'Little House on the Prairie' Reboot on Netflix
moments.blurb: A new adaptation of the classic 'Little House on the Prairie' stories premiered on Netflix on July 9, bringing the Ingalls family to a new generation.

angles.name: Family Viewing
angles.copy: Nostalgia alert! The 'Little House on the Prairie' reboot is now on Netflix. Perfect family viewing, or best left in the past?

angles.name: Classic Remake
angles.copy: Sweeping landscapes and timeless tales – the 'Little House on the Prairie' reboot arrived on Netflix last week. Are you watching?

moments.title: 'The Dark' Thriller on ITV
moments.blurb: The moody new thriller 'The Dark', starring Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale, premiered on ITV in July.

angles.name: New Thriller
angles.copy: Need a new obsession? The dark and twisty thriller 'The Dark' is on ITV this month. Have you tuned in?

angles.name: Scottish Wilderness
angles.copy: An eerie new thriller set in the Scottish wilderness, 'The Dark' is a must-watch on ITV. Who's brave enough?

moments.title: 'Ann Droid' Comedy on BBC
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan returns to BBC One this July in 'Ann Droid', a quirky new comedy set in 2029 about a robot companion for the elderly.

angles.name: New Comedy
angles.copy: Diane Morgan is back! Her new comedy 'Ann Droid' is on BBC One this month. Are you ready for some laughs?

angles.name: Quirky TV
angles.copy: A robot companion for the elderly in 2029? Diane Morgan's 'Ann Droid' is the quirky new BBC comedy you need to see. Thoughts?

moments.title: 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' S2
moments.blurb: Season 2 of 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar', catching up with the reality show's couples, premiered on Netflix on July 12.

angles.name: Reality TV Catch-up
angles.copy: Did you tune in? 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' Season 2 dropped on Netflix this week! Spill the tea on the couples!

angles.name: Relationship Drama
angles.copy: From pods to real life drama! 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' is back on Netflix. Are you team happy ever after, or did it all go wrong?

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt Turns 80
moments.blurb: Iconic American singer Linda Ronstadt, known for hits like 'You're No Good' and 'Blue Bayou', celebrates her 80th birthday today.

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: Sending huge birthday wishes to the incredible Linda Ronstadt, who turns 80 today! What's your favourite song from her iconic career?

angles.name: Vocal Powerhouse
angles.copy: The legendary Linda Ronstadt celebrates her 80th birthday! Still a vocal powerhouse and an absolute icon of the 70s.

moments.title: Olly Alexander Turns 36
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter Olly Alexander, frontman of Years & Years and recent Eurovision representative, celebrates his 36th birthday today.

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 36th Birthday to the brilliant Olly Alexander! From Years & Years to Eurovision, he always delivers. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Musical Talent
angles.copy: Celebrating Olly Alexander's 36th today! An incredible talent and a true pop icon. What's your favourite Years & Years banger?

moments.title: Richard Marx Turns 57
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Richard Marx, known for 80s and 90s soft rock hits like 'Right Here Waiting', celebrates his 57th birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Get ready to sing along! Richard Marx turns 57 tomorrow. What's your favourite power ballad from the 80s icon?

angles.name: Love Song King
angles.copy: Sending early birthday wishes to the king of love songs, Richard Marx, who's 57 tomorrow! 'Right Here Waiting' still gives us chills!

moments.title: Priyanka Chopra Jonas Turns 44
moments.blurb: Indian actress, singer, and producer Priyanka Chopra Jonas celebrates her 44th birthday this Friday, July 18.

angles.name: Global Star
angles.copy: Happy early birthday to the multi-talented Priyanka Chopra Jonas, who turns 44 this Friday! Actress, singer, icon!

angles.name: Actress & Singer
angles.copy: From Bollywood to Hollywood, and a successful music career! Priyanka Chopra Jonas celebrates her 44th on Friday. What's your favourite of her tracks?

moments.title: Selena Gomez Turns 34
moments.blurb: American singer, actress, and producer Selena Gomez, known for her chart-topping music and roles in film and TV, celebrates her 34th birthday on July 22.

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: Next Wednesday, the incredible Selena Gomez turns 34! Get ready to celebrate with her biggest hits!

angles.name: From Disney to Diva
angles.copy: Remember her Disney days? Selena Gomez turns 34 next week! What's your favourite era of her music?

moments.title: Slash Turns 61
moments.blurb: Legendary Guns N' Roses guitarist Slash, one of rock's most iconic figures, celebrates his 61st birthday on July 23.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 61st birthday to the one and only Slash next Thursday! What's your favourite Guns N' Roses riff?

angles.name: Guitar Icon
angles.copy: The top hat, the guitar solos... Slash turns 61 next week! Celebrate the rock icon's birthday by cranking up a GNR classic!

moments.title: Daniel Radcliffe Turns 37
moments.blurb: English actor Daniel Radcliffe, globally renowned for his role as Harry Potter, celebrates his 37th birthday on July 23.

angles.name: Wizarding World
angles.copy: The boy who lived turns 37 next Thursday! Happy birthday to Daniel Radcliffe! What's your favourite Harry Potter film?

angles.name: Beyond Potter
angles.copy: From Hogwarts to Broadway and beyond, Daniel Radcliffe turns 37 next week! What's your favourite of his non-Potter roles?

moments.title: Summer Holidays Begin for Many
moments.blurb: School summer holidays are beginning across parts of the UK this week, with many breaking up from Friday, July 17.

angles.name: School's Out
angles.copy: The countdown is ON for many! School summer holidays are starting across the UK this week. What are your plans for the break?

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: Freedom! Summer holidays are kicking off for a lot of families this week. Best of luck to everyone navigating the long break!
